title: 童年
artist: Lo Ta-yu (sample lyrics for layout demo)

lines.pinyin: chí táng biān de róng shù shàng
lines.en: On the banyan tree by the pond

lines.pinyin: zhī liǎo zài shēng shēng jiào zhe xià tiān
lines.en: Cicadas call out the summer, again and again

lines.pinyin: cāo chǎng biān de qiū qiān shàng
lines.en: On the swing by the playground

lines.pinyin: zhǐ yǒu hú dié tíng zài shàng miàn
